import openai


def generate_long_report(topic: str) -> str:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="gpt-4",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": f"Write a detailed report on {topic}"}],
        max_tokens=8000,
    )
    full_text = response.choices[0].message.content
    return full_text


def get_embeddings_batch(texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    response = client.embeddings.create(
        model="text-embedding-ada-002",
        input=texts,
    )
    all_embeddings = [item.embedding for item in response.data]
    return all_embeddings


def stream_chat_response(prompt: str) -> str:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="gpt-4",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
        max_tokens=4000,
    )
    collected = ""
    for chunk in response:
        collected += chunk.choices[0].message.content
    return collected
